input.jobDescription: We are hiring an AI/ML Engineer Intern with strong knowledge of Python, machine learning, deep learning, computer vision, TensorFlow or PyTorch, model evaluation, and API integration. Responsibilities include developing ML models, preprocessing datasets, building computer vision pipelines, experimenting with CNN architectures, documenting results, and collaborating with developers to integrate models into web applications. Preferred skills include FastAPI, REST APIs, Git, Docker, RAG, LLMs, and experience with healthcare or image analysis projects.
